Job poster

About the job

Backend Senior Software Engineer



London (Hybrid)



£90,000 - £100,000

Here at Data Idols, we're working with an innovative technology business that is scaling a cutting-edge AI-powered platform used by enterprise clients globally. As the platform continues to grow, they're looking for a Backend Senior Software Engineer to play a key role in shaping its future architecture, scalability and technical direction.

This is an opportunity to join a high-performing engineering team where you'll have genuine influence over architecture, technology decisions, product direction and engineering standards.

The Opportunity

As a Backend Senior Software Engineer, you'll take ownership of key platform components from design through to deployment, optimisation and ongoing support. Working within a modern cloud-native environment, you'll help design, build and scale the backend services that power an AI-driven platform entering a significant growth phase and supporting an increasingly large enterprise customer base.

You'll be solving complex engineering challenges around scalability, performance and reliability, designing distributed systems and building resilient enterprise-grade software that forms the foundation of the platform.

This is a highly visible role where you'll collaborate closely with product and engineering leadership to shape technical roadmaps, influence architecture decisions and contribute to the long-term evolution of the platform. You'll be responsible for delivering high-quality, resilient software, improving engineering processes and tooling, and driving best practice across development, testing, deployment and monitoring.

Skills and Experience
  • Strong commercial experience developing backend software using Python, alongside experience with languages such as Java, Go, Kotlin, C++ or similar
  • Commercial experience with TypeScript
  • Experience building and operating applications within AWS/GCP environments
  • Strong understanding of scalable system design and distributed systems
  • Hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines and modern engineering practices
  • Experience building resilient, cloud-native, enterprise-grade applications

If you're an experienced backend software engineer looking to solve complex technical challenges and help shape a modern cloud-native platform, we'd love to hear from you.

Backend Senior Software Engineer

About the company

Data Idols
53,566 followers
Staffing and Recruiting 11-50 employees 7 on LinkedIn

Data Idols work with the UK's leading data focused tech companies, we help organisations apply Data Engineering and Data Science techniques to improve the delivery of data projects, through consulting, recruitment, training and events.

We believe strongly that the data world is changed, you now need to have an awareness of multiple different technologies and platforms. One platform doesn't fit all and increasingly companies we work with are implementing different technologies dependent on very specific project requirements. …
